Day 2 - Qatar Equestrian Federation Cup
programme.desc: Qatar Equestrian Federation Cup 2026 concludes the Doha Equestrian Tour at Al Shaqab, bringing together more than 200 riders in CSI1* to CSI5* show jumping classes and a total prize purse of €784,000. The competition features ranking classes, Grand Prix action and decisive Jump-Off rounds, where faults and time determine the winners.

Longines Global Champions Tour - Madrid Jumping - Round 1 - Competition Team
programme.desc: The 2026 Madrid round takes place from 15–17 May at Club de Campo Villa de Madrid, as part of the elite global show jumping circuit. The event features three days of top-level CSI5* action, highlighted by the LGCT Grand Prix of Madrid on Sunday, where leading riders and horses compete for key championship points.

programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Shanghai Jumping - Round 1 Competition Team
programme.desc: Held at the Shanghai Juss International Equestrian Centre, featuring CSI5* show jumping with fences up to 1.60m. The schedule includes the Global Champions League team competition and the Grand Prix, with riders earning points toward the season standings. Technical courses emphasize combinations and time allowed on a compact arena.

programme.title: Brighton & Hove Albion vs Tottenham Hotspur - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 5
programme.desc: Brighton completed a Premier League double over Tottenham Hotspur last season – the only time they have ever won back-to-back league meetings with Spurs. Tottenham Hotspur have lost away to Brighton in both of the last two league seasons but have never before lost three successive visits.

programme.title: Arsenal vs Nottingham Forest - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 4
programme.desc: In all competitions, Arsenal have won their last six home games against Nottingham Forest by an aggregate score of 19-2. The Gunners are unbeaten in 14 games on home soil against Forest since a 3-1 defeat back in March 1989. Nottingham Forest have won just two out of 16 Premier League matches against Arsenal and both wins came at the City Ground,

programme.title: Brentford vs Chelsea - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 4
programme.desc: Just one of the eight Premier League meetings between Brentford and Chelsea have been won by the home side, a 2-1 win for the Blues in December 2024. Brentford have won three Premier League matches against Chelsea but all of them have been away from home – at home, they are winless in four against the Blues.

programme.title: Burnley vs Liverpool - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 4
programme.desc: Burnley have lost 14 of their 18 Premier League matches against Liverpool, including each of their last five in a row since a 1-0 win at Anfield in January 2021. programme.title: Day 1 - ATP 250 Vanda Pharmaceuticals Mallorca Championships 2026
programme.desc: ATP 250 Vanda Pharmaceuticals Mallorca Championships 2026 takes place at the Mallorca Country Club in Santa Ponça, Spain. Played on outdoor grass courts under warm Mediterranean conditions, the tournament serves as one of the final ATP events before Wimbledon and offers players a last opportunity to adjust to grass-court competition.

programme.title: Portugal vs DR Congo - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be the first ever encounter between Portugal and Congo DR. Portugal’s two defeats against African opposition at the FIFA World Cup both came against Morocco, in 1986 and in the quarter-finals of the 2022 edition. However, they are unbeaten against teams from sub-Saharan Africa at the World Cup, with three wins and one draw.

programme.title: Argentina vs Algeria - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: Argentina and Algeria will meet at the FIFA World Cup for the first time. Their only previous encounter was a June 2007 friendly – Argentina won 4-3 at Barcelona’s Camp Nou. programme.title: Ghana vs Panama - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be the first ever meeting between Ghana and Panama. Ghana’s three previous FIFA World Cup matches with CONCACAF teams all came against the USA – the Black Stars won two and lost one. Their first encounter, in the 1974 group stage, ended 0-0 and featured Johan Cruyff’s famous ‘Cruyff turn’ – one of 11 successful dribbles in the match, the joint-most by any player in a game at that tournament. programme.title: Scotland vs Morocco - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: Scotland and Morocco’s only previous encounter was in the group stages of the 1998 World Cup – Morocco won 3-0, their largest World Cup victory to date. Nine of Morocco’s last 12 World Cup matches have come against European teams. In fact, no side has played as many WC matches against European opposition since the 2018 tournament as Morocco.

programme.title: Türkiye vs Paraguay - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: Türkiye and Paraguay are meeting at the World Cup for the first time. Their only previous encounter was a friendly in Chile over 30 years ago, in June 1995 – the game ended goalless. Paraguay have won only two of their last 14 World Cup matches against opposition from the UEFA confederation : 3-1 v Slovenia in 2002 and 2-0 against Slovakia in 2010.

programme.title: Belgium vs Egypt - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: Belgium and Egypt will meet at the FIFA World Cup for the first time. Their four previous encounters were all friendlies, with Egypt winning three and Belgium one. Belgium and Egypt’s last encounter came in a November 2022 friendly – Egypt won 2-1 in Kuwait City.

programme.title: Saudi Arabia vs Uruguay - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: Saudi Arabia and Uruguay are meeting at the FIFA World Cup for the second time. Their first encounter came in the 2018 group stage, where Uruguay won 1-0 with a goal from Luis Suárez. Saudi Arabia have a balanced FIFA World Cup record against CONMEBOL teams, with one win and one defeat.

programme.title: Iran vs New Zealand - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: Iran and New Zealand will meet at the FIFA World Cup for the first time. Their two previous encounters ended in a 0-0 draw and a 3-0 win for Iran. programme.title: Spain vs Cape Verde - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be the first ever meeting between Spain and Cabo Verde. Nigeria are the only CAF team to beat Spain at the FIFA World Cup, in the group stages of the 1998 edition. Their last two encounters with African opposition were both against Morocco, with both ending in draws.

programme.title: Portugal vs DR Congo - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be the first ever encounter between Portugal and Congo DR. Portugal’s two defeats against African opposition at the FIFA World Cup both came against Morocco, in 1986 and in the quarter-finals of the 2022 edition. However, they are unbeaten against teams from sub-Saharan Africa at the World Cup, with three wins and one draw.

programme.title: England vs Croatia - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: England and Croatia are meeting at the FIFA World Cup for the second time. Their first encounter came in the semi-final of the 2018 tournament – Croatia won 2-1 after extra-time. This is the fourth match between England and Croatia at a major tournament this century – twice at the FIFA World Cup and twice at the UEFA European Championship. Sweden

programme.title: Ghana vs Panama - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be the first ever meeting between Ghana and Panama. Ghana’s three previous FIFA World Cup matches with CONCACAF teams all came against the USA – the Black Stars won two and lost one. Meanwhile, Panama’s sole World Cup match against an African side was a 2-1 defeat to Tunisia in the 2018 group phase.

programme.title: Uzbekistan vs Colombia - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage

programme.title: Scotland vs Morocco - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: Scotland and Morocco’s only previous encounter was in the group stages of the 1998 World Cup – Morocco won 3-0, their largest World Cup victory to date.
